creator: mel.xyzzy@rachie.is-a-geek.net
text:
Revised.

Explicetedly setting -j disables -B, which is needed for some ports. Patch now 
changes nothing in default installs.
If BUILD_JOBS is set, JOB_FLAGS is populated.

NO_PARALLEL still disables parallel building.
WANT_MAKE_COMPAT now adds -B to JOB_FLAGS. Some ports compile fine with -j2 
but struggle with target order, if not in compat mode.

I'm in the process of compiling all leaves that I use on my machines, with 
this patch and sticking appropreate NO_PARALLEL/WANT_MAKE_COMPAT flags in 
$origin/Makefile.local, so I can see the impact.
At present, the list is as follows:
# find . -name Makefile.local -exec grep -l -E '(WANT_MAKE_COMPAT|
NO_PARALLEL)' {} +
./audio/libsndfile/Makefile.local
./devel/gperf/Makefile.local
./devel/libthai/Makefile.local
./devel/nasm/Makefile.local
./devel/pth/Makefile.local
./graphics/libart_lgpl/Makefile.local
./net-mgmt/net-snmp/Makefile.local
./print/ghostscript8/Makefile.local
./security/libgpg-error/Makefile.local

Roughly 400 ports compiled.

--- bsd.port.mk.revised.patch begins here ---
Index: Mk/bsd.port.mk
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk,v
retrieving revision 1.609
diff -u -r1.609 bsd.port.mk
--- Mk/bsd.port.mk	23 Jan 2009 16:27:14 -0000	1.609
+++ Mk/bsd.port.mk	30 Jan 2009 21:44:58 -0000
@@ -2127,6 +2127,14 @@
 MD5_FILE?=		${MASTERDIR}/distinfo
 
 MAKE_FLAGS?=	-f
+.if defined(NO_PARALLEL) || !defined(BUILD_JOBS)
+JOB_FLAGS=
+.else
+JOB_FLAGS=		-j${BUILD_JOBS}
+.if defined(WANT_MAKE_COMPAT)
+JOB_FLAGS+=		-B
+.endif
+.endif
 MAKEFILE?=		Makefile
 MAKE_ENV+=		PREFIX=${PREFIX} \
 			LOCALBASE=${LOCALBASE} X11BASE=${X11BASE} \
@@ -3645,9 +3653,9 @@
 .if !target(do-build)
 do-build:
 .if defined(USE_GMAKE)
-	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${GMAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} 
${MAKEFILE} ${MAKE_ARGS} ${ALL_TARGET})
+	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${GMAKE} ${JOB_FLAGS} 
${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} ${MAKE_ARGS} ${ALL_TARGET})
 .else
-	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} 
${MAKEFILE} ${MAKE_ARGS} ${ALL_TARGET})
+	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${MAKE} ${JOB_FLAGS}  
${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} ${MAKE_ARGS} ${ALL_TARGET})
 .endif
 .endif
--- bsd.port.mk.revised.patch ends here ---
 

-- 
Mel
